title: WorkflowCheckpoint
description: Durable recovery anchor written after important lifecycle transitions. Recovery truth — can be reconstructed from EventLog + Registry.

checkpoint_id.description: Globally unique checkpoint identifier, prefixed with 'ckpt_'.

work_item_id.description: Work item this checkpoint belongs to.

phase.description: Pack-registered phase when this checkpoint was written.

phase_category.description: Optional common category for cross-pack queries.

state.description: Core state at the time of this checkpoint.

artifacts.description: List of artifact_id references known at this checkpoint.

event_id.description: The event that triggered this checkpoint write.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this checkpoint was created.

checksum.description: SHA-256 of the checkpoint content (excluding this checksum field). Used for integrity verification during recovery.
